name: grok-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate structured, read-only Grok 4.5 advice, research, plan gates, panels, and workspace reviews from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Keep Codex in charge while Grok 4.5 provides high-effort structured plan gates, sourced research, independent panels, and read-only workspace reviews.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok 4.5 to gate this plan and return PLAN_APPROVED or PLAN_REVISE.
Use Grok 4.5 to research this decision with structured claims and sources.
Run a two-member Grok panel, then compare the independent reviews.
